# anthropic_skills_usage (Data Source)

Skills invocation counts (success/failure breakdown) for the date range.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_skills_usage" "last_week" {
  starting_date = formatdate("YYYY-MM-DD", timeadd(timestamp(), "-168h"))
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `ending_date` (String)
- `starting_date` (String)

### Read-Only

- `skills` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--skills))

<a id="nestedatt--skills"></a>
### Nested Schema for `skills`

Read-Only:

- `failure_count` (Number)
- `invocation_count` (Number)
- `skill_name` (String)
- `success_count` (Number)
